      • Class ZReportPanel

        class ZReportPanel extends JPanel implements Serializable

          • bottomPanel

          • currentReportDate
            String currentReportDate
          • table
            JTable table
          • tableScrollPane
            JComponent tableScrollPane
            Tracking the scroll pane allows us to dispose of it once it is not needed anymore

            Such as when regenerating the Z report for a different day

            Using JComponent instead of JScrollPane to accommodate the JSplitPane used for the chart

          • titleLabel
            JLabel titleLabel
